channel.title: Enterprise on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: One-click fixes for failing Actions with Copilot cloud agent
item.description:
GitHub Actions failures can now be handed to Copilot cloud agent with one click for Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise subscribers. The new “Fix with Copilot” button starts an automated fix flow for failed jobs.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GPT-5.3-Codex is now the base model for Copilot Business and Enterprise
item.description:
GPT-5.3-Codex is now the default base model for all Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise organizations, replacing GPT-4.1. GitHub says the base model is used when an organization has not selected another model.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: New enterprise installation API now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub has introduced a new Enterprise Installation API in public preview for GitHub App developers. The API fills a gap identified from community feedback and lets an app determine whether it is installed in an enterprise.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot code review user counts now aggregate in usage metrics API
item.description:
The Copilot usage metrics API now aggregates Copilot code review active and passive user counts in enterprise and organization usage reports. This follows the launch of active and passive user identification for Copilot code review.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics now identify active Copilot coding agent users
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics now show which users have Copilot coding agent (CCA) activity. Enterprise and organization admins can use this to identify active CCA users by day and other usage views.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GPT-5.3-Codex long-term support in GitHub Copilot
item.description:
GitHub introduced GPT-5.3-Codex as a long-term support (LTS) model for GitHub Copilot, aimed at giving enterprises a stable option for internal security and safety reviews. The LTS commitment is available for Copilot Business and Copilot plans.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Discover and manage agent activity with new session filters
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise AI Controls and the agent control plane add new session filters to help enterprises find and manage agent activity.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: security: Malicious AI Assistant Extensions Harvest LLM Chat Histories
item.description:
Microsoft reports a campaign of malicious AI browser extensions that exfiltrated LLM chat histories and browsing data from services including ChatGPT and DeepSeek, affecting large numbers of users and enterprises.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: github: Copilot metrics now includes plan mode
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics now include telemetry for plan mode. Enterprises can track plan mode adoption and engagement alongside existing Copilot metrics.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics now includes enterprise-level GitHub Copilot CLI activity
item.description:
GitHub Copilot enterprise usage metrics now include GitHub Copilot CLI telemetry, expanding what’s counted in enterprise-level reporting.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise-defined custom organization roles are generally available
item.description:
GitHub now generally makes available enterprise-defined custom organization roles to help enterprises standardize role-based access across multiple organizations.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise team support in organization APIs
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise organization owners can now discover and manage both enterprise teams and organization teams via existing organization team API endpoints.

  • Source: GitHub
